symptoms.leaves: Diamond-shaped lesions with gray center and dark brown border, 1-2cm long
symptoms.stem: Dark brown-black lesions at nodes, may cause neck rot and stem breakage
symptoms.fruit: Panicle neck turns brown-black, grains shrivel and turn chalky

blast.favorable_conditions: High humidity >90%, temperature 25-28°C, excessive nitrogen fertilization

symptoms.leaves: Water-soaked yellowish stripes along leaf margins, turning white then gray, leaves dry from tip
symptoms.stem: Amber-colored bacterial ooze on cut stems in morning

bacterial_blight.favorable_conditions: Warm temperature 25-34°C, high humidity, strong winds, flooding

treatment.cultural: balanced fertilization, avoid excess nitrogen, drain fields

symptoms.leaves: Oblong brown lesions on uppermost leaf sheath enclosing panicle
symptoms.stem: Rotting of flag leaf sheath, white powdery fungal growth inside
symptoms.fruit: Panicle partially emerges or remains trapped, unfilled grains

sheath_rot.favorable_conditions: High humidity, insect damage to sheath, dense planting

symptoms.leaves: Orange-brown oval pustules scattered on upper leaf surface, powdery spores released when touched
symptoms.stem: Occasional elongated pustules on stem sheath, dark brown to black

rust.favorable_conditions: Cool nights 15-20°C, warm days, high humidity, dew formation

symptoms.leaves: No significant leaf symptoms until heading
symptoms.fruit: Entire ear replaced by mass of black powdery spores, sori covered by thin membrane that ruptures

smut.favorable_conditions: Seed-borne infection, moderate temperature 20-25°C during flowering

symptoms.fruit: Partial conversion of grain to black powdery mass, fishy smell, only part of kernel affected

karnal_bunt.favorable_conditions: Cool temperature 18-22°C with high humidity during flowering

symptoms.leaves: Yellowing and wilting starting from lower leaves, progressing upward, one-sided wilting common
symptoms.stem: Brown discoloration of vascular tissue visible when stem is cut lengthwise
symptoms.roots: Darkened, partially decayed root system with brown vascular strands
symptoms.fruit: Premature fruit drop, small undersized fruits

wilt.favorable_conditions: Warm soil 25-30°C, acidic soil pH, poor drainage, nematode damage

treatment.cultural: crop rotation, raise soil pH with lime, resistant varieties

symptoms.leaves: Upward or downward curling of leaves, thickened veins, dark green vein swelling (enations) on underside
symptoms.fruit: Severely reduced boll formation, small deformed bolls

leaf_curl.favorable_conditions: High whitefly population, warm temperature 25-35°C, continuous cotton cropping

treatment.cultural: remove infected plants, control whitefly, resistant varieties

symptoms.leaves: Angular pale spots on upper surface with white-grey powdery growth on lower surface
Dark brown concentric ring spots (target-board pattern) starting on older lower leaves
symptoms.stem: Dark sunken lesions near soil line on seedlings (collar rot)
symptoms.fruit: Dark leathery sunken spots near stem end of fruit

early_blight.favorable_conditions: Warm temperature 24-29°C, alternating wet and dry periods, stressed plants

treatment.cultural: crop rotation, remove infected debris, adequate nutrition

symptoms.leaves: Large irregular water-soaked dark green-brown patches, white fuzzy growth on underside in humid conditions
symptoms.stem: Dark brown-black firm lesions, entire stem may collapse
symptoms.roots: Tubers show irregular brown-purple blotches on skin, reddish-brown granular rot inside
symptoms.fruit: Firm brown greasy-looking patches on green fruit

late_blight.favorable_conditions: Cool temperature 15-22°C, high humidity >90%, prolonged leaf wetness, rain

treatment.cultural: destroy volunteer plants, improve air circulation, avoid overhead irrigation

symptoms.leaves: Mottled light and dark green mosaic pattern, leaf distortion, curling, fern-like appearance
symptoms.fruit: Uneven ripening, brown wall patches inside fruit, reduced size

mosaic_virus.favorable_conditions: Mechanical transmission via tools and hands, seed-borne, high plant density

treatment.note: No chemical cure for viral diseases

symptoms.leaves: Aerial tubers may form, purplish discoloration of upper leaves
symptoms.stem: Brown canker lesions at base, white fungal collar at soil line (white leg)
symptoms.roots: Black hard sclerotia on tuber surface like soil that won't wash off
symptoms.fruit: Misshapen tubers, cracked tubers, reduced tuber size

black_scurf.favorable_conditions: Cool wet soil, heavy clay soil, infected seed tubers

treatment.cultural: use clean seed, avoid planting in cold wet soil

symptoms.roots: Raised corky rough patches on tuber skin, shallow to deep pitted lesions
symptoms.fruit: Cosmetic damage to tubers, rough scabby surface

common_scab.favorable_conditions: Alkaline soil pH >5.5, dry soil during tuber formation, low organic matter

symptoms.leaves: White raised blister-like pustules on lower leaf surface, yellow patches on upper surface
symptoms.stem: Swollen distorted stems and inflorescence (staghead formation)
symptoms.fruit: Distorted pods with no seed formation in severe cases

white_rust.favorable_conditions: Cool temperature 12-20°C, high humidity, morning dew

treatment.cultural: early sowing, resistant varieties, remove infected plants

symptoms.leaves: Dark brown-black circular spots with concentric rings, spots coalesce causing leaf blight
symptoms.fruit: Dark spots on pods, premature pod shattering, shriveled seeds

alternaria_blight.favorable_conditions: Warm humid weather 20-25°C, rain during flowering and pod formation

treatment.cultural: early sowing, wider spacing, remove crop debris

symptoms.leaves: Purplish-brown irregular patches on upper surface, white-grey downy growth on lower surface
symptoms.stem: White fungal growth on young stems, stunted growth

downy_mildew.favorable_conditions: Cool moist weather 10-18°C, heavy dew, fog

treatment.cultural: resistant varieties, proper drainage, avoid overcrowding
